targetTranslation: when (introducing something certain to happen in the future)
ayahEnglish: When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness]

targetTranslation: it (feminine) was intensively rolled up (referring to الشَّمْسُ/the sun)
ayahEnglish: When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness]

targetTranslation: it (feminine) scattered/darkened (referring to النجوم/the stars)
ayahEnglish: And when the stars fall, dispersing,

targetTranslation: it (feminine) was made to move (referring to الْجِبَالُ/the mountains)
ayahEnglish: And when the mountains are removed

targetTranslation: was abandoned (referring to she/it)
ayahEnglish: And when full-term she-camels are neglected

targetTranslation: she/it was gathered (referring to الْوُحُوشُ - the wild beasts)
ayahEnglish: And when the wild beasts are gathered

targetTranslation: it (referring to البِحَارُ - the seas) was forcefully filled/heated
ayahEnglish: And when the seas are filled with flame

targetTranslation: she was joined/paired (referring to النُّفُوسُ - the souls)
ayahEnglish: And when the souls are paired

targetTranslation: she was asked (referring to الْمَوْءُۥدَةُ - the buried alive girl)
ayahEnglish: And when the girl [who was] buried alive is asked

targetTranslation: sin/wrong (possessed by أَيّ)
ayahEnglish: For what sin she was killed

targetTranslation: she was killed violently (referring to المَوْءُۥدَةُ - the buried alive girl)
ayahEnglish: For what sin she was killed

targetTranslation: it (f) was spread out (referring to الصُّحُفُ - the scrolls)
ayahEnglish: And when the pages are spread [i.e., made public]

targetTranslation: it (feminine) was stripped away (referring to السَّمَآءُ/the sky)
ayahEnglish: And when the sky is stripped away

targetTranslation: was made to blaze fiercely (feminine)
ayahEnglish: And when Hellfire is set ablaze

targetTranslation: it (Paradise) was brought near (feminine past tense)
ayahEnglish: And when Paradise is brought near,

targetTranslation: she knew (subject of نَفْسٌ)
ayahEnglish: A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it].

targetTranslation: a soul/self (doer of عَلِمَتْ)
ayahEnglish: A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it].

targetTranslation: what/that which (with emphasis)
ayahEnglish: A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it].

targetTranslation: she brought/made present (subject of عَلِمَتْ)
ayahEnglish: A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it].

targetTranslation: I swear
ayahEnglish: So I swear by the retreating stars -

targetTranslation: when (referring to عَسْعَسَ - it becomes dark)
ayahEnglish: And by the night as it closes in

targetTranslation: it departed/came (referring to الَّيْلِ, the night)
ayahEnglish: And by the night as it closes in

targetTranslation: when (followed by تَنَفَّسَ)
ayahEnglish: And by the dawn when it breathes [i.e., stirs]

targetTranslation: it breathed itself out
ayahEnglish: And by the dawn when it breathes [i.e., stirs]

targetTranslation: a messenger (who delivers the noble words)
ayahEnglish: [That] indeed, it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is a word [conveyed by] a noble messenger [i.e., Gabriel]

targetTranslation: a noble/generous/honorable (describing رَسُولٍ - messenger)
ayahEnglish: [That] indeed, it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is a word [conveyed by] a noble messenger [i.e., Gabriel]

targetTranslation: owner of (العَرْشِ - the throne)
ayahArabic: ذِى قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍ
ayahEnglish: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position],

targetTranslation: a strength (describing ذِى - one who has)
ayahArabic: ذِى قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍ
ayahEnglish: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position],

targetTranslation: in the presence of (ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ - the Owner of the Throne)
ayahArabic: ذِى قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍ
ayahEnglish: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position],

targetTranslation: owner of, possessor of (قُوَّةٍ - power)
ayahArabic: ذِى قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍ
ayahEnglish: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position],

targetTranslation: firmly established (describing the noble messenger mentioned earlier)
ayahArabic: ذِى قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍ
ayahEnglish: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position],

targetTranslation: one who is truly obeyed (in a general sense)
ayahEnglish: Obeyed there [in the heavens] and trustworthy.

targetTranslation: there (location being discussed)
ayahEnglish: Obeyed there [in the heavens] and trustworthy.

targetTranslation: a trustworthy one (describing جِبْرِيل)
ayahEnglish: Obeyed there [in the heavens] and trustworthy.

targetTranslation: your companion (subject of وَمَا)
ayahEnglish: And your companion [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ) ] is not [at all] mad.

targetTranslation: he saw him (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ seeing Angel Jibreel)
ayahEnglish: And he has already seen him [i.e., Gabriel] in the clear horizon.

targetTranslation: he (subject of بِضَنِينٍ)
ayahEnglish: And he [i.e., Muḥammad (ﷺ)] is not a withholder of [knowledge of] the unseen.

targetTranslation: he/it (referring to the Quran in this ayah)
ayahEnglish: And it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is not the word of a devil, expelled [from the heavens].

targetTranslation: a devil/satan (object of قَوْلِ)
ayahEnglish: And it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is not the word of a devil, expelled [from the heavens].

targetTranslation: intensely cursed and driven away (describing شَيْطٰنٍ/Satan)
ayahEnglish: And it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is not the word of a devil, expelled [from the heavens].

targetTranslation: you all go (after فَأَيْنَ - so where)
ayahEnglish: So where are you going?

targetTranslation: he/it (referring to the Quran in this ayah)
ayahEnglish: It is not except a reminder to the worlds

targetTranslation: a remembrance (that is being described in هُوَ)
ayahEnglish: It is not except a reminder to the worlds

targetTranslation: he willed/wanted
ayahEnglish: For whoever wills among you to take a right course.

targetTranslation: he seeks to be straight
ayahEnglish: For whoever wills among you to take a right course.

targetTranslation: you all want/wish (present tense)
ayahArabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And you do not will except that Allāh wills - Lord of the worlds.

targetTranslation: he wishes/wants
ayahArabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And you do not will except that Allāh wills - Lord of the worlds.

targetTranslation: Allah (as the subject of يَشَآءَ - He wills)
ayahArabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And you do not will except that Allāh wills - Lord of the worlds.

targetTranslation: The Lord (subject of يَشَآءَ)
ayahArabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And you do not will except that Allāh wills - Lord of the worlds.
